title: interTwin D3.2 DTE First software release
author: David, Mario
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The document describes the first interTwin DTE release along with all necessary steps towards it. It includes the Software release procedure, the Quality Criteria (mandatory and optional) required for each component, how each component is tracked and finally the release itself alongside some statistics about the number of components and their status.
steps_raw: The document describes the first interTwin DTE release along with all necessary steps towards it. It includes the Software release procedure, the Quality Criteria (mandatory and optional) required for each component, how each component is tracked and finally the release itself alongside some statistics about the number of components and their status.
